news.t: The ‘Other' Elon Musk Stock Is Still Worth a Look
Investors Want Big Bets on Tesla and Nvidia Stock. Leveraged ETFs Are Falling Short.
ETFs that allow investors to make big bets on market moves are gaining in popularity
Why these ‘Trump trade' ETF winners are fading — and what it says about the financial markets
TSLY vs TSLL: One is a better Tesla ETF to buy

holdings.infoBox: TSLL is an equity ETF with a total of 16 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt stock at 28.98%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 28.26%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 24.20%, Jp Morgan 100 Us Trsy Capital 3163 at 24.04%, and Tesla at 11.49%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily TSLA Bull 2X ETF (TSLL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Tesla stock. TSLL was launched on Aug 9, 2022 and is issued by Direxion.
